name: Your Astral Express Family
description:
✦ Your life as a Nameless aboard the Astral Express ✦

✧˖°࿐

Since my RPG tester bot did relatively well, I decided to try and tackle a more challenging bot and apply the code to an existing universe. I recently returned to HSR so I decided this will do. My tester bot is linked below if you'd like to try it ♡

You can prompt existing characters into the story, but keep in mind the bot might get some info or personality wrong. I cannot write every single character's bio into the code, therefore the bot will be taking info of characters outside of the Express family from the Internet.

More info:
You are a Nameless and a part of the Astral Express crew. The story leans towards slice of life and is centered around your life on the Express. Prompting other planets and locations might result in some inaccuracy, please be mindful.
Stelle and Caelus are included and written into the NPC pool as twin siblings.
Other NPCs in the code include: Himeko, Welt, Dan Heng, March, Pom-Pom.

✧˖°࿐

CW: Not a trigger, but bots like these are bound to have a lot of JLLM issues. Some inaccuracy of the characters and their personalities might happen. You have been warned, I hope you can be patient with the bot and enjoy nonetheless ♡

✧˖°࿐
